sentences.target: J'enfouis mes pieds dans le sable.

translations.fr: J'enfouis mes pieds dans le sable.
translations.en: I bury my feet in the sand.
translations.es: Hundo los pies en la arena.
translations.de: Ich vergrabe meine Füße im Sand.
translations.pt: Enterro os meus pés na areia.
translations.nl: Ik begraaf mijn voeten in het zand.
translations.uk: Я закопую свої ноги в пісок.
translations.hi: मैं अपने पैर रेत में गाड़ता हूँ.
translations.el: Χώνω τα πόδια μου στην άμμο.
translations.nb: Jeg begraver føttene mine i sanden.

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun elided before a vowel; 1st person singular, nominative subject.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive, selects a direct object.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular possessor; plural form agreeing with 'pieds'.
Common noun, masculine plural; direct object of 'enfouis'.
Preposition introducing a prepositional phrase.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'sable'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: Il enfouit le jouet sous le coussin.
sentences.reading: /il ɑ̃.fwi lə ʒwɛ su lə kusɛ̃/

translations.fr: Il enfouit le jouet sous le coussin.
translations.ipa: /il ɑ̃.fwi lə ʒwɛ su lə kusɛ̃/
translations.en: He buries the toy under the cushion.
translations.es: Esconde el juguete debajo del cojín.
translations.de: Er versteckt das Spielzeug unter dem Kissen.
translations.it: Nasconde il giocattolo sotto il cuscino.
translations.zh-Hans: 他把玩具藏在靠垫下面。
translations.yue: 佢將玩具藏喺靠墊下面。
translations.pt: Ele esconde o brinquedo debaixo da almofada.
translations.he: הוא מחביא את הצעצוע מתחת לכרית.
translations.vi: Anh ấy giấu đồ chơi dưới gối.
translations.nl: Hij verstopt het speelgoed onder het kussen.
translations.hu: Elrejti a játékot a párna алá.
translations.hi: वह खिलौने को कुशन के नीचे छुपाता है.
translations.el: Κρύβει το παιχνίδι κάτω από το μαξιλάρι.
translations.id: Dia menyembunyikan mainan di bawah bantal.
translations.ja: 彼はおもちゃをクッションの下に隠す。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person singular, masculine.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'jouet'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'enfouit'.
Preposition introducing a locative phrase.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'coussin'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'sous'.

sentences.target: Tu enfouis ta tête dans ton écharpe.
sentences.reading: /ty ɑ̃.fwi ta tɛt dɑ̃ tɔ̃ neʃaʁp/

translations.fr: Tu enfouis ta tête dans ton écharpe.
translations.ipa: /ty ɑ̃.fwi ta tɛt dɑ̃ tɔ̃ neʃaʁp/
translations.en: You bury your head in your scarf.
translations.es: Metes la cara en la bufanda.
translations.de: Du vergräbst deinen Kopf in deinem Schal.
translations.zh-Hans: 你把头埋进你的围巾里。
translations.yue: 你把頭埋喺你條頸巾入面。
translations.ru: Ты прячешь голову в свой шарф.
translations.pt: Você enfia a cabeça no seu cachecol.
translations.he: אתה טומן את הראש בתוך הצעיף שלך.
translations.vi: Bạn vùi đầu vào chiếc khăn quàng.
translations.nl: Je begraaft je hoofd in je sjaal.
translations.uk: Ти ховаєш голову у свій шарф.
translations.hi: तुम अपना सिर अपने मफलर में छुपाते हो.
translations.el: Χώνεις το κεφάλι σου στο κασκόλ σου.
translations.nb: Du begraver hodet i skjerfet ditt.
translations.id: Kamu membenamkan kepalamu ke dalam syalmu.
translations.sv: Du begraver huvudet i din halsduk.
translations.ro: Îți îngropi capul în eșarfa ta.
translations.da: Du begraver hovedet i dit halstørklæde.
translations.ja: マフラーに頭をうずめる。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; transitive.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular possessor; feminine singular agreeing with 'tête'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'enfouis'.
Preposition introducing a prepositional phrase.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular possessor; masculine singular form used before vowel-initial feminine noun ('écharpe') for euphony.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: On va enfouir les bulbes au jardin.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ va ɑ̃.fwiʁ le bylb o ʒaʁdɛ̃/

translations.fr: On va enfouir les bulbes au jardin.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ va ɑ̃.fwiʁ le bylb o ʒaʁdɛ̃/
translations.en: We’re going to bury the bulbs in the garden.
translations.es: Vamos a plantar los bulbos en el jardín.
translations.de: Wir pflanzen die Blumenzwiebeln im Garten.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们要在花园里种球根。
translations.yue: 我哋會喺花園度種球根。
translations.ru: Мы собираемся посадить луковицы в саду.
translations.pt: Vamos plantar os bulbos no jardim.
translations.he: אנחנו הולכים לשתול את הפקעות בגינה.
translations.vi: Chúng ta sẽ trồng các củ ở trong vườn.
translations.nl: We gaan de bollen in de tuin planten.
translations.uk: Ми збираємося посадити цибулини в саду.
translations.hu: El fogjuk ültetni a hagymákat a kertben.
translations.hi: हम बगीचे में कंद रोपने वाले हैं.
translations.el: Θα φυτέψουμε τους βολβούς στον κήπο.
translations.nb: Vi skal plante løkene i hagen.
translations.id: Kita akan menanam umbi di taman.
translations.sv: Vi ska plantera lökarna i trädgården.
translations.cs: Chystáme se zasadit cibulky na zahradě.
translations.da: Vi skal plante løgene i haven.
translations.ja: 庭に球根を植えるつもりだ。

Common noun, masculine plural; direct object of 'enfouir'.
Contraction of 'à + le'; preposition introducing the locative phrase ('au jardin').
